# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud network security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "dev-team-nsg",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Network Security Group"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the NSG"
      }
    },
    "allowedSourceAddresses": {
      "type": "array",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of allowed source IP addresses or CIDR ranges for management access"
      }
    },
    "enableJitAccess": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Flag to indicate if JIT access should be used instead of permanent rules"
      }
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-05-01",
      "name": "[parameters('nsgName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTPS-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTPS traffic from internet",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "443",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1000,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTP-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTP traffic from internet",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "80",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1010,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-SSH-From-Authorized-IPs",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow SSH only from authorized IP addresses",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22",
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": "[parameters('allowedSourceAddresses')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1020,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-RDP-From-Authorized-IPs",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow RDP only from authorized IP addresses",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389",
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": "[parameters('allowedSourceAddresses')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1030,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Deny-All-Other-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Deny all other inbound traffic",
              "protocol": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "*",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Deny",
              "priority": 4096,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "nsgId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
    },
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('nsgName')]"
    }
  }
}
